mapper.select: select id, username, nickname, status, is_deleted as isDeleted from admin_user where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select COUNT(*) from admin_user where username = #{username} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into admin_user( username, password, nickname, status, create_by, update_by ) values ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy} )
mapper.update: update admin_user set nickname = #{dto.nickname}, status = #{dto.status}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
UPDATE admin_user SET status = #{status}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
update admin_user set password = #{password}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update admin_user set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select COUNT(*) from admin_user where id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
select id, username, nickname, status, is_deleted as isDeleted from admin_user where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
